questions.question: Which country took over the Chairmanship of the Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) on 1 January 2025?
The Paris Agreement, adopted in 2015, aims to:
Where was the semicryogenic engine hot test held in April 2025?
In May 2025, which venture capital firm launched a new investment vertical to support startups in India's defence and strategic technology sectors?
Who among the following is the first African woman to assume office as the Commonwealth Secretary General in April 2025?
The Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI) released which edition of its publication titled 'Women and Men in India 2024: Selected Indicators and Data' in April 2025?
Who among the following inaugurated seventh edition of the Khelo India Youth Games 2025 held at Bihar?
Which Indian state announced a ₹6,124 crore investment to boost road connectivity and infrastructure expansion in 2025?
In May 2025, China announced visa-free access for all member states of which regional organisation?
questions.option_1: South Asian Association for Regional Cooperation (SAARC)

questions.question: The India Infrastructure Report 2023, released in December 2023 by Shri M Venkaiah Naidu, is related to _________.
As per the Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways of the Government of India, which port is known as the largest container port in India (as of May 2025)?
Which among the following developed Bhargavastra, a multi-layered counter-drone system designed to neutralise drone threats, in May 2025?
Which of the following Indian players won two Olympic medals in a single edition of the Games in Paris 2025 and was awarded with Major Dhyan Chand Khel Ratna Award in January 2025?
In May 2025, the Indian Army held the 'Teesta Prahar' integrated field exercise in which state to demonstrate operational readiness and combined operational capabilities?
Who among the following Grammy-winning Indian musicians was awarded the Padma Shri in 2025?
Which unit of the Indonesian Special Forces participated in Exercise GARUD SHAKTI, held in November 2024?
At the 8ᵗʰ Indian Ocean Conference held in Muscat on 16-17 February 2025, which theme was unveiled to enhance maritime partnerships among member nations?
questions.option_1: Voyage to New Horizons of Maritime Partnership

questions.question: Who hosted the 6ᵗʰ BIMTEC Summit in April 2025?
Who among the following led the official media briefing on India's Operation Sindoor in May 2025?
questions.option_1: General Anil Chauhan and Air Marshal AK Bharti
questions.option_2: Lt Gen Rajiv Ghai and Commodore Raghu R Nair
questions.option_3: Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri and Defence Minister Rajnath Singh
questions.option_4: Colonel Sofiya Qureshi and Wing Commander Vyomika Singh

questions.question: Where was the 6ᵗʰ summit of the Bay of Bengal Initiative for Multi-Sectoral Technical and Economic Cooperation (BIMSTEC) held on 4 April 2025?
Union Cabinet approved PM-Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana in 2024, to provide subsidy for the installation of rooftop solar in how many households across India?
Which country topped the World Press Freedom Index, 2025, released by Reporters Without Borders (RSF)?
Who is the Director General of Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) as of May 2025?
Which tunnel was inaugurated by Prime Minister Narendra Modi in Jammu and Kashmir on 13 January 2025?
Which of the following states hosted the 7ᵗʰ edition of the Khelo India Youth Games in May 2025 along with New Delhi?
